title: Complete checkout from selected items
description: This verifies that a customer can select items, continue to checkout, submit shipping and billing details, and reach order confirmation.

steps.description: Add a food item to the cart
Fill shipping details with valid information
Fill billing details with valid information
Verify the order confirmation page is displayed
Verify an order confirmation is visible

title: Unauthenticated user is blocked from the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that a user without admin authentication cannot access the protected admin dashboard.

steps.description: Verify access to the admin dashboard is blocked or redirected
Verify admin panels are not displayed

title: Browse menu and add a food item to the cart
description: This verifies that a customer can view the menu and add a food item to the cart successfully.

steps.description: Add a food item to the cart
Verify the cart reflects the added item

title: Browse menu and add a drink item to the cart
description: This verifies that a customer can view the menu and add a drink item to the cart successfully.

steps.description: Add a drink item to the cart
Verify the cart reflects the added item

title: Authenticated admin can view the dashboard panels
description: This verifies that an authenticated admin can access the admin area and review the dashboard panels successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify site configuration controls are visible

title: Authenticated admin can update site configuration
description: This verifies that an authenticated admin can change site configuration and see the updated setting persist in the admin area.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify the updated configuration is visible
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Homepage links customers into the ordering flow
description: This verifies that a customer can start on the homepage, navigate to the menu, and proceed toward checkout.

steps.description: Add a menu item to the cart
Verify the cart reflects the added item

title: Checkout requires shipping and billing details
description: This verifies that a customer cannot submit checkout without the required shipping and billing information and sees validation feedback.

steps.description: Submit the order without filling required fields
Verify the order is not confirmed

title: Customer can browse supporting pages
description: This verifies that a customer can open the supporting public pages and view their content without disrupting the ordering experience.

steps.description: Verify the contact page content is displayed
Verify the locations page content is displayed
Verify the privacy policy content is displayed
Click the terms of service link
Verify the terms of service content is displayed

title: Checkout prevents empty submission
description: This verifies that an empty checkout state does not allow an order to be placed and shows guidance to add items first.

steps.description: Submit the order without any selected items
Verify an empty cart or no-selection message is visible
Verify the order is not confirmed
